rulings.Case Title: TRACI GRACE VS. ALVIN BAUM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, Including Request For Additional And Alternate Relief Under Ccp 473(B)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 27, 2019 Line 3. DEFENDANT ALVIN BAUM Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, Including Request For Additional And Alternate Relief Under Ccp 473(B) is GRANTED in part and DENIED in party. Judgment on the Pleadings to the entire complain based on waiver is DENIED. Each cause of action is based, at least in part, on the alleged wrongdoings occurring after the date effective date of waiver. While the Court currently does not rule on the validity of the waiver as to existing claims, Defendants fail to cite any authority for the proposition that claims that have not yet accrued at the effective date of the waiver may be waived in the operative settlement agreement. Judgment on the Pleadings as to the Sixth cause of action for failure to comply with buyout regulations is granted with leave to amend for Plaintiff allege facts showing that the settlement agreement was a "buyout agreement" within the meaning of SFRO 37.9E, specifically what consideration was paid to tenant to vacate the rental unit. The Court notes that Plaintiff currently takes the position that $110,000 paid in settlement was "to recover unpaid wages," not to vacate the premises (Opposition 6:21); no other consideration is alleged. Judgment on the pleadings as to this cause of action is otherwise denied. Judgment on the Pleadings as to the Seventh cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress is granted with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of this cause of action, including outrageous conduct. Judgment on the Pleadings as to the Eighth cause of action for Negligent Misrepresentation is granted with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of this cause of action, including reasonable reliance. = (501/CFH)
